headline: SCOTUS 🍊👨‍⚖️ GIVES TRUMP DEPORT PASS 🛂🚫 for 350K HAITIANS 🇭🇹😱
text: SCOTUS 🍊👨‍⚖️ 6-3 SLAM DUNK 💥🏀 lets Trump 🍊👑 TERMINATE TPS 🛑🧳 for 350K Haitians 🇭🇹💔 and 6K Syrians 🇸🇾😢 after 2010 quake 🌋 and 2012 civil war 💣! The T in TPS stands for TEMPORARY ⏰ not forever amnesty 🆓❌, says DHS lawyer Percival 🧑‍⚖️ on X 🐦! Alito 🧑‍⚖️🕶️ drops the gavel 🔨: courts CAN'T review 🍽️❌ gov moves, and no proof of racial hate 😡🚫! Kagan 👩‍⚖️🔥 dissents: 'race entered the chat 💬✊' and 'statements SHOUT undertones 🗣️🔊'! Sotomayor 👩‍⚖️🌹 warns: 'more will die 💀🚨 and more will cross illegally 🏃‍♂️🌵'! New rule: no asylum till you set foot on US soil 👣🇺🇸, so migrants stuck in Mexico 🇲🇽😭 can't apply at ports 🛂🚫! Obama-era metering 2016 📅🔄 gets revived like a zombie 🧟‍♂️! Habig 🧑‍💼 cries 'community crisis 📉🏚️, families split 💔, economies wrecked 📉💸'! Trump 🍊👑 claps back: 'rule of law wins 🏆⚖️, common sense prevails 🧠✅'! TPS holders can live/work 18 months but now face deportation ✈️🚫 back to violence 🗡️🔥! Local govs 47 strong 🏛️🤝 file briefs but SCOTUS says nope 🙅‍♂️! Alito calls it 'straightforward' like a highway 🛣️🚗, Suri 💼 says 'can't arrive while standing in Mexico 🇲🇽🚫'! Sotomayor predicts 'predictable deaths 💀😭' but Trump team cheers 'win for law 🏛️🍾'! Hundreds of thousands now at risk 📉😱, TPS ripped like a bad bandaid 🩹💥! Border policy back like 2016 remix 🎵🔁, Biden's 2021 rescind gets reversed 🔄❌! 'More people will attempt illegal cross 🌵🚷' but Alito says ordinary speech rules 🗣️📜! TPS quake 2010 🌋 and Syria war 2012 💣 now history books 📖😢! SCOTUS clears path 🛤️✅ for mass removal ✈️🚫, 'human cost felt across America 🇺🇸💔'! Alito: 'no one arrives before entering' 🛬🚫, Kagan shouts racial vibes 🎤✊! Trump ally vibes amplified pet-eating rumors 🐕🍽️ but court says no equal protection breach 🚫⚖️! 350K Haitians 🇭🇹 and 6K Syrians 🇸🇾 now in limbo 🌀😰, local economies tank 📉💸, families torn 💔👨‍👩‍👧! SCOTUS 6-3 double win 🏆🏆: TPS stripped and asylum door slammed 🚪🔒! 'Temporary means temporary' 🕒❗ says DHS, 'not de facto amnesty' 🆓🚫! Sotomayor dissent: 'more will die 💀' but Alito: 'straightforward case' 📜✅! Border metering revived like old school bop 🎤🔁, migrants can't apply till US soil touched 👣🇺🇸! 47 local leaders 🏛️🤝 lose fight, Habig warns 'violence instability collapse' 🗡️🌪️! Trump 🍊👑 gets green light 🟢🚦 to end protected status 🛑🛡️, TPS holders face removal ✈️😱! Court backs 'common sense' 🧠✅ and 'rule of law' ⚖️🏆! Hundreds of thousands impacted 📉😭, 'human cost across America' 🇺🇸💔! Alito opinion drops like mic 🎤💥, 'can't arrive in place before entering' 🛬🚫! Kagan: 'race entered resolve' ✊💬, Sotomayor: 'predictable deaths' 💀😭! TPS after Haiti quake 2010 🌋 and Syria war 2012 💣 now stripped 🛑❌! 350K Haitians 🇭🇹 and 6K Syrians 🇸🇾 at risk 📉🚨! Border asylum blocked till US soil 👣🇺🇸, metering 2016 back 🔄✅! SCOTUS 6-3 rules, Trump wins big 🏆🍊, families split 💔, economies hit 📉💸! 'Temporary not forever' 🕒❗ DHS cheers, 'win for law' ⚖️🏆! Alito: 'ordinary speech' 🗣️📜, no review courts 🍽️❌! Kagan dissent 'racial undertones' 🎤✊, Sotomayor 'more die' 💀😭! 350K face deportation ✈️🚫 back to chaos 🌀🔥! TPS quake 2010 🌋 Syria 2012 💣 history 📖😢! SCOTUS clears path 🛤️✅ for mass removal, 'human cost' 🇺🇸💔 felt everywhere 🌍😱!
